channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Panera Hours of Operation Change Starting 5/26/2026
item.description: Please note that Panera will have a change in hours of operations beginning 5/26/2026. To better serve our community this summer, Panera will now be open from 10:00 am - 6:00 pm Monday - Friday. Thank you for your understanding and continued support of Rensselaer Dining. Be sure to follow Rensselaer Dining on social media @rensselaerdining for all the latest updates.
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI LGTBQ+ Taskforce & EMPAC Pride Celebration!
item.description: Get ready to celebrate love, identity, and community—we’re thrilled to invite you to our Pride Preparation Party on Friday, May 29th and to march with us in the Capital Pride Parade on Sunday, June 14th! Please fill out this form and share if you plan to join!
item.author: Community

item.title: Update on Instructure/Canvas Security Incident
item.description:
Following our recent communication regarding the Instructure (Canvas) security incident, Instructure has informed Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute that no RPI data was impacted by this event.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
